zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Howard於大約1468年出生時，她的父親John Howard 1st Duke of Norfolk47歲，母親Margaret Chedworth44歲。她於1497年11月8日與John Bourchier結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1536年3月22日在英國艾可享年69歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦藍白斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine Howard于大约1468年出生时，她的父亲John Howard 1st Duke of Norfolk47岁，母亲Margaret Chedworth44岁。她于1497年11月8日与John Bourchier结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1536年3月22日在英国艾可享年69岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦藍白斯。

nameMeanings.name: Howard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, from the Middle English personal names Huward (also Howard) and Heward, from Old French Huard (itself from ancient Germanic Hugihard, hugi- ‘mind, understanding, spirit’ + hard- ‘hardy, bold’). As Hugh appears in Middle English as both How and Hew, this is the definite origin of Heward and a source of Howard. This surname is also very common among African Americans. See Hugh .

English: from the Middle English personal name Haward or Howard, usually an Anglicized form of Old Danish Hāwarth (Old Norse Hávarthr, from há ‘high’ + varthr ‘guard, guardian, warden’). Alternation between Haward and Howard may have led to later confusion with Hayward .
English: occasionally a variant of   Ewart   2.

variants.name: Fogarty
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, James Patrick, Kieran, Seamus, Siobhan.
Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Fógartaigh ‘son of Fógartach’, a personal name from fógartha ‘proclaimed, banished, outlawed’. It is sometimes Anglicized as Howard .

variants.name: Huggard
meanings: English: of Norman origin, from the medieval personal name Hugard, a variant of Huard (see Howard ). This surname is also established in Ireland (Kerry).

variants.name: Hayward
meanings: occupational name from Middle English hayward ‘keeper of the hedges and enclosures’ (Old English hēgweard), a manorial officer in charge of the common fields who protected corn and hay from cattle, theft, or damage, and supervised the harvest.

variants.name: Huard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Aime, Adelard, Jacques, Jean-Pierre, Lucien, Marcel, Alcide, Amiee, Armand, Aurele, Clermont, Fernard.
French and Channel Islands (Jersey): from the Old French personal name Huart, either identical in origin with Howard 1 or a pet form of Old French Hue .
History: Jean Huard from Courson-Monteloup in Essonne, France, married Anne-Marie Amiot in Quebec City, QC, in 1670.

variants.name: Hugh
meanings: English, Welsh, and Scottish (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Hue, from ancient Germanic Hugo (ultimately derived from hugi- ‘mind, spirit’). This was a very popular name in England after the Norman Conquest, partly due to the reputation of Saint Hugh of Lincoln (1140–1200), who was born in Burgundy and who established the first Carthusian monastery in England.
Scottish and Irish: adopted as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic personal name Aodh, a derivative of a Gaelic word meaning ‘fire’. See Hughes .
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 邱 and 丘, based on their Hakka pronunciation; see   Qiu   1 and 2.

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Howard was born about 1468, her father, John Howard 1st Duke of Norfolk, was 47 and her mother, Margaret Chedworth, was 44. She married John Bourchier on 8 November 1497. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died on 22 March 1536, in Essex, England, at the age of 69, and was buried in Lambeth, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine Howard est née environ 1468, son père, John Howard 1st Duke of Norfolk, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Margaret Chedworth, avait 44 ans. Elle a épousé John Bourchier le 8 novembre 1497. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 22 mars 1536, à Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterrée à Lambeth, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine Howard um 1468 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Howard 1st Duke of Norfolk 47 und ihre Mutter Margaret Chedworth 44. Sie hat am 8. November 1497 John Bourchier geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 22. März 1536 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Essex, England und wurde in Lambeth, London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Howard è nata il circa 1468, sua padre, John Howard 1st Duke of Norfolk, aveva 47 anni e sua madre, Margaret Chedworth, aveva 44 anni. Lei sposato John Bourchier il 8 novembre 1497. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 22 marzo 1536, nel Essex, England, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolta a Lambeth, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Howardが約1468年に生まれた時，父John Howard 1st Duke of Norfolkは47歳，母Margaret Chedworthは44歳であった。1497年11月8日にJohn Bourchierと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1536年3月22日にイギリスエセックスで69歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンランベスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Howard(이)가 대략 1468년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Howard 1st Duke of Norfolk(은)는 47세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Chedworth(은)는 44세였다. 그녀는 1497년 11월 8일 John Bourchier(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1536년 3월 22일 영국 에세스에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 램스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Howard nasceu aproximadamente 1468, seu pai, John Howard 1st Duke of Norfolk, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Chedworth, tinha 44 anos. Ela casou-se com John Bourchier em 8 de novembro de 1497. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 22 de março de 1536, em Essex, Inglaterra, com 69 anos, e foi sepultada em Lambeth, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Howard родилась около 1468 г., её отцу по имени John Howard 1st Duke of Norfolk было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Chedworth, 44. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Bourchier 8 ноября 1497 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла 22 марта 1536 г. в местности эссекс, Англия в возрасте 69 лет и была похоронена в местности лэмбет, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katherine Howard nació aproximadamente 1468, su papá, John Howard 1st Duke of Norfolk, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Margaret Chedworth, tenía 44 años. Se casó con John Bourchier el 8 de noviembre de 1497. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 22 de marzo de 1536, en Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultada en Lambeth, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
